title: LlamaCppRuntime score + embed implementations
goal: Implement the score() (sequence log-prob) and embed() (text -> embedding vector) ModelRuntime trait methods for LlamaCppRuntime via llama-cpp-2 evaluation primitives. score returns Score { token_logprobs, total_logprob }; embed returns Embedding { vector: Vec<f32>, model_id, dim }.
unblock_conditions: MT-074 generate path merged (shares sampler infrastructure).
implementation_notes: score: feed `sequence: Vec<u32>` token-by-token through llama_cpp_2 decode, collect logits[i][sequence[i+1]] (the logprob of the next token) for i in 0..len-1; return Score { token_logprobs: Vec<f32>, total_logprob: f32 (sum) }. Used by Memory V0+ Self-Improvement Loop scoring (MemoryCapsule effectiveness). embed: requires model loaded with embeddings=true context param (MT-073 added); call llama_cpp_2 embed_eval or llama_get_embeddings_ith to get pooled sentence embedding; return Embedding { vector, model_id, dim }. Embedding dimension is model-dependent (e.g., 768 / 1024 / 4096); store on Embedding struct so consumers can validate dim match. score on a model not loaded returns explicit Err; embed on a model with embeddings=false context returns CapabilityNotSupported. Tests (env-gated): score a known sequence on a small model and assert total_logprob is negative finite; embed two similar prompts and assert cosine_similarity > 0.7 (sanity check); embed on a non-embedding model returns CapabilityNotSupported.
risk_if_missed: score / embed paths missing; MemoryCapsule scoring (cluster D) cannot be implemented; self-improvement loop missing a signal.
validator_focus: Embedding dim matches model declared dim; sanity cosine similarity > 0.7 on similar prompts; capability gate correct.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

implementation_evidence.summary: Implemented LlamaCppRuntime score() and embed() wiring through llama-cpp-2 native contexts. score validates token ids, decodes source tokens in n_batch-sized chunks, reads next-token logits, computes finite non-positive log probabilities, and returns the live Score shape. embed tokenizes text, decodes with embeddings enabled, returns finite deterministic vectors, and fails closed with CapabilityNotSupported when embeddings are disabled.

contract_drift_handled.contract_text: MT contract mentions Score { token_logprobs, total_logprob } and Embedding { vector, model_id, dim }.
contract_drift_handled.live_trait_shape: Current product types are Score { token_logprobs: Vec<f32>, mean_logprob: f32 } and Embedding { vector: Vec<f32> }.
contract_drift_handled.selected_approach: Implemented against the live shared ModelRuntime trait/types instead of reshaping shared runtime data contracts inside MT-078; validator should treat the older field names as contract drift recorded here, not as missing fields in this implementation.

sources_checked: llama.cpp bundled headers/source for llama_decode, llama_encode, embeddings_ith, embeddings_seq, pooling_type behavior
upstream llama.cpp embedding behavior comments in include/llama.h
local ModelRuntime trait/types and existing llama.cpp generate/KV/speculative adapter patterns
selected_patterns: Use LlamaBatch + decode + get_logits_ith for sequence scoring; logits at source position i score token i+1.
Use llama.cpp embedding-enabled context and output-marked batch tokens for embedding extraction.

Do not force pooled sequence embeddings onto generative GGUF models whose default pooling_type is unspecified; default to llama.cpp model behavior and use last output token embedding when sequence pooling is unavailable.
rejected_options: Changing shared Score/Embedding structs in this MT to match stale contract prose because that would widen blast radius beyond owned LlamaCppRuntime files.
Forcing Mean pooling globally on every llama.cpp context because it produced a native STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION on the configured generative GGUF embedding test.
Using encode-first for the configured decoder-only GGUF because the safe wrapper path can crash in this model/runtime combination.

native_crash_reproduction_and_fix.failure: STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION in the isolated embedding test after forcing pooling_type=Mean and running encode-first on the configured generative GGUF.
native_crash_reproduction_and_fix.fix: Changed default pooling to Unspecified, decode-first for generative contexts, mark all embedding batch tokens as outputs, and fall back from embeddings_seq_ith(0) to embeddings_ith(-1) when llama.cpp reports NonePoolType.

red_test.note: Pre-implementation failures proved score/embed placeholder behavior and incorrect capability handling.

focused_native_score_embed.note: 6 passed, 0 failed, including real configured GGUF score/embed/capability guard tests.

default_feature_score_embed.note: 1 passed, 0 failed; disabled-native path compiles and missing-model typed errors are non-placeholder.

native_generate_regression.note: 8 passed, 0 failed; context default changes did not regress native generation.

residual_risks: Returned embeddings for the configured generative GGUF are last output token hidden-state embeddings when sequence pooling is unavailable, not a dedicated retrieval embedding model output. Validator should decide whether MT-078 requires a later dedicated embedding-model fixture.
Encoder-only embedding models were not live-validated in this session; decode-first with encode fallback is implemented, but the live proof uses the configured decoder/generative GGUF.
Cargo output still includes pre-existing crate warnings outside MT-078 llama.cpp files; no MT-078-specific new warnings were observed in the focused logs.
No Integration Validator has reviewed this MT; status is READY_FOR_VALIDATION only.

minimum_controls: Embedding context requirement enforced (embed without embeddings=true returns CapabilityNotSupported).
score returns finite negative float (not NaN/Inf/positive).
Embedding dim asserted against model card declared dim.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: score() and embed() implemented against live ModelRuntime trait; embedding-disabled capability gate enforced; native crash (STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION on Mean pooling) investigated and fixed via decode-first + Unspecified pooling default.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: score() and embed() implemented against live ModelRuntime trait; embedding-disabled capability gate enforced; native crash (STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION on Mean pooling) investigated and fixed via decode-first + Unspecified pooling default.
